nodes.title: OpenSpec: session-snapshot-timeline
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline. Adds a Sessions tab to BdHealthPanel showing ruflo session snapshots with a timeline list and detail drawer.

nodes.title: 1.1: Define SessionSnapshot type in ruflo_sessions.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §1.1. Create `src-tauri/src/commands/ruflo_sessions.rs`. Define `SessionSnapshot { id: String, name: String, created_at: String, is_auto: bool, metadata: Option<serde_json::Value> }` deriving `serde::Serialize`, `serde::Deserialize`, and `specta::Type`. Compute `is_auto` from `name.starts_with("auto-")` at parse time.

nodes.title: 1.2: Implement list_session_snapshots Tauri command
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §1.2. Implement `list_session_snapshots(project_path: String) -> Result<Vec<SessionSnapshot>, String>` Tauri command: spawn `ruflo session list --json` via `std::process::Command` with `current_dir(project_path)`. On exit code 0, parse stdout into `Vec<SessionSnapshot>`. On I/O error or 'command not found', return sentinel `Err("ruflo CLI not found".to_string())`. On non-zero exit code, return `Err(stderr_verbatim)`. On JSON parse failure, return `Err` containing the parse error and leading stdout characters.

nodes.title: 1.3: Register ruflo_sessions module and command in lib.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §1.3. Add `pub mod ruflo_sessions;` to `src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs`. Register `list_session_snapshots` in `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` in both `tauri::generate_handler!` and the `tauri_specta::collect_commands!` macro alongside existing commands.

nodes.title: 2.1: Unit test — parse fixture JSON into Vec<SessionSnapshot>
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §2.1. Unit test: parse a representative `ruflo session list --json` fixture string (a JSON array with one `auto-*` entry and one non-`auto-*` entry) into `Vec<SessionSnapshot>`; assert `is_auto` is `true` for the `auto-*` name and `false` for the other.

nodes.title: 2.2: Unit test — malformed JSON returns Err with parse context
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §2.2. Unit test: malformed JSON input returns `Err` whose message contains the JSON parse error and at least the first 40 characters of the malformed input.

nodes.title: 2.3: Document mock-spawn gap and file follow-up issue
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §2.3. Note: if the codebase has no existing pattern for mocking spawned child processes at the command level, document the gap in a code comment and rely on the parser-level unit tests (2.1, 2.2) instead. File a follow-up Beads issue for the mock-spawn integration test.

nodes.title: 3.1: Run specta codegen to regenerate src/bindings.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §3.1. Run the specta codegen step (`bun tauri build` or the project's codegen script if defined) to regenerate `src/bindings.ts` with `SessionSnapshot` and `listSessionSnapshots`.

nodes.title: 3.2: Add listSessionSnapshots wrapper in src/ipc.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §3.2. Add `listSessionSnapshots(projectPath: string): Promise<SessionSnapshot[]>` wrapper in `src/ipc.ts`, matching the style of existing wrappers (e.g. `getChangeBeadsProgress`).

nodes.title: 4.1: Add activeTab state to BdHealthPanel
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §4.1. Add `const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'checks' | 'sessions'>('checks')` near other panel-level state in `BdHealthPanel.tsx`.

nodes.title: 4.2: Render Checks | Sessions tab strip below panel header
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §4.2. Render a tab strip immediately below the panel header. Two tabs: "Checks" (default) | "Sessions". Style: `text-sm` neutral text, `border-b-2 border-current` on the active tab, no pill or background.

nodes.title: 4.3: Gate existing checks markup behind activeTab === 'checks'
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §4.3. Wrap the existing checks markup in `{activeTab === 'checks' && (…)}`. Render `<SessionsTab project={project} />` in the `{activeTab === 'sessions' && (…)}` block.

nodes.title: 4.4: Move Re-run button to render only in Checks tab
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §4.4. Move the "Re-run" button so it only renders when `activeTab === 'checks'`. The Sessions tab owns its own Refresh button inside `SessionsTab`.

nodes.title: 5.1: Create SessionsTab.tsx with project prop
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §5.1. Create `src/components/health/SessionsTab.tsx`. Accept `{ project: string }` as props.

nodes.title: 5.2: Add local state to SessionsTab
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §5.2. Local state: `snapshots: SessionSnapshot[] | null`, `isLoading: boolean`, `error: string | null`, `selectedId: string | null`, `rufloNotFound: boolean`.

nodes.title: 5.3: useEffect to load snapshots and detect ruflo sentinel
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §5.3. `useEffect` on mount and on `project` change: call `listSessionSnapshots(project)`, update state. Detect the `"ruflo CLI not found"` sentinel by checking `err.message?.includes('ruflo CLI not found')` and set `rufloNotFound = true`.

nodes.title: 5.4: Render three states — rufloNotFound, empty, and populated list
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §5.4. Render three states: (a) `rufloNotFound` → "Ruflo CLI not configured" empty state with install hint; (b) `snapshots.length === 0` → "No session snapshots yet."; (c) populated → list of `<button>` rows, newest first, each showing timestamp + auto|manual chip + metadata summary.

nodes.title: 5.5: Add Refresh button to SessionsTab header
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §5.5. Render a "Refresh" button in the tab header. Clicking it re-runs step 5.3. Disable the button while `isLoading` is true.

nodes.title: 5.6: Render snapshot detail drawer (aside, w-96, slide-in)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §5.6. Drawer: `<aside>` fixed-right, `w-96 max-w-full`, slide-in. Opens when `selectedId !== null`. Renders: snapshot name, formatted created-at, full `metadata` as `<pre className="text-[10px] font-mono overflow-auto">`, and two action buttons ("View memory entries from this session" / "Restore conversation context"). Closes on Esc and on backdrop click.

nodes.title: 6.1: View memory entries action — navigate or clipboard with toast
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §6.1. "View memory entries from this session": compute `from = selected.created_at`, `to = nextSnapshot?.created_at ?? Date.now()`. Clamp to 30 days; show amber warning if gap > 7 days. Navigate to Memory view with `?ts_from&ts_to`, or copy `|ts:<from>-<to>|` to clipboard with toast and file follow-up if route not available.

nodes.title: 6.2: Restore conversation context action — copy snapshot ID with toast
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §6.2. "Restore conversation context": call `navigator.clipboard.writeText(snapshot.id)`. On success, show toast: "Snapshot ID copied. Paste into a fresh Claude Code session: `ruflo session restore <id>`". On clipboard rejection, show fallback toast displaying the full snapshot ID.

nodes.title: 6.3: Close drawer on Escape keydown and backdrop click
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §6.3. Close the drawer on `Escape` keydown (via `useEffect` adding a window keydown listener while `selectedId !== null`) and on backdrop overlay click.

nodes.title: 7.1: cargo test ruflo_sessions::tests passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §7.1. `cargo test -p beadspec_lib ruflo_sessions::tests` passes (covers tasks 2.1 and 2.2).

nodes.title: 7.2: bun tsc --noEmit passes after bindings regeneration
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §7.2. `bun tsc --noEmit` passes after bindings regeneration.

nodes.title: 7.3: bun run lint passes for BdHealthPanel.tsx and SessionsTab.tsx
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §7.3. `bun run lint` passes for `BdHealthPanel.tsx` and `SessionsTab.tsx`.

nodes.title: 7.4: Manual — Sessions tab shows rows; drawer opens; clipboard works
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §7.4. Manual: open a project that has run at least one Claude Code session with the Stop hook enabled. Open Health view → Sessions tab → confirm at least one row appears. Click a row → drawer opens with metadata JSON. Click "Restore conversation context" → clipboard contains the snapshot ID and toast appears.

nodes.title: 7.5: Manual — ruflo absent shows 'Ruflo CLI not configured'
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §7.5. Manual: with `ruflo` removed from PATH, confirm the Sessions tab shows "Ruflo CLI not configured" and the Checks tab continues to work normally.

nodes.title: 7.6: openspec validate session-snapshot-timeline passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/session-snapshot-timeline/tasks.md §7.6. `openspec validate session-snapshot-timeline` passes.
